title: fix: rename Id::from_trusted / UTCDate::from_trusted to from_raw
description:
## Problem
from_trusted is non-standard naming. The Rust ecosystem convention for bypassing validation is new_unchecked or from_raw. 'Trusted' implies a security property rather than a caller assertion that the invariant holds.

## Solution
Rename from_trusted to from_raw (or new_unchecked) on both Id and UTCDate. Update all call sites.

## Acceptance
- from_trusted renamed consistently across both types and all call sites
- No other behavior changes
